name: openclaw-task-manager
description: Manage Windows Task Scheduler tasks for OpenClaw agents with naming convention enforcement, registry tracking, version history, and a browser dashboard.
author: DOSBot (Daniel Schott)
shortDescription: Browser dashboard and CLI for managing Windows Task Scheduler tasks with OpenClaw naming conventions and version history.
features: Version history with full restore capability
Import existing Windows tasks into the registry
Orphan detection for tasks in Windows but not in registry
CLI scripts: create, delete, import, list, status, registry
Flask auto-detection across known project venvs
